qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: Let be an undirected graph with positive edge weights. Dijkstra's single source shortest path algorithm can be implemented using the binary heap data structure with time complexity: A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: To implement Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm on unweighted graphs so that it runs in linear time, the data structure to be used is: A. Queue B. Stack C. Heap D. B-Tree

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: Dijkstra's single source shortest path algorithm when run from vertex in the above graph, computes the correct shortest path distance to A. only vertex B. only vertices C. only vertices D. all the vertices
